items.name: 1964 Anniversary Series
items.note: Nicaraguan puro with rich cocoa and coffee notes — a club favorite for special occasions.

items.name: Hemingway Short Story
items.note: Short, flavorful perfecto — ideal when you want a premium smoke without a long sit-down.

items.name: Champagne Noir
items.note: Smooth, creamy Connecticut wrapper — an easy recommendation for newer smokers.

items.name: Decade
items.note: Full-bodied Habano with pepper and leather — great with an evening pour.

items.name: Undercrown Maduro
items.note: Sweet maduro wrapper and a reliable burn — a solid everyday stick at a fair price.

items.name: House sampler pack
items.note: Staff-picked five-pack rotated weekly — a low-risk way to explore new blends.

items.name: Limited release box
items.note: Small-batch and regional exclusives land here — ask what is in the humidor this week.

items.name: Humidor rotation
items.note: Our full walk-in humidor holds hundreds of SKUs — staff will walk you to the right shelf.
